Bash(ffprobe -v quiet -print_format json -show_packets -select_streams v:0 "/Users/ben/Development/SAVD/CODE/savd-app/docs/95C0E148-DE71-4FB6-B72D-87480004D09E-watermarked.mp4" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
packets = data['packets']
keyframes = [p for p in packets if p.get\('flags',''\) == 'K_']
print\(f'Total video packets: {len\(packets\)}'\)
print\(f'Keyframes: {len\(keyframes\)}'\)
if len\(keyframes\) > 1:
    pts_vals = [float\(p['pts_time']\) for p in keyframes]
    intervals = [pts_vals[i+1]-pts_vals[i] for i in range\(len\(pts_vals\)-1\)]
    print\(f'Keyframe interval range: {min\(intervals\):.3f}s - {max\(intervals\):.3f}s'\)
    print\(f'Avg keyframe interval: {sum\(intervals\)/len\(intervals\):.3f}s'\)
    print\('Keyframe timestamps:', [f\\"{t:.2f}\\" for t in pts_vals]\)
" 2>&1)
